Container.Name: obd-dashboard
Container.Overview: Self-hosted dashboard for the Peugeot 308 SW 1.5 BlueHDi (ECU MD1CS003). Parses CarScanner CSV/BRC exports and MyOpel .myop files, applies RBS byte-swap corrections, runs the DPF state machine, generates AI insights in Italian, and shows everything in a React/Leaflet UI. Single container: nginx + uvicorn supervised together. Drop files in the mapped "OBD files" and "MyOpel files" directories — they're auto-processed within seconds.
Container.Description: Self-hosted dashboard for OBD trip data. Parses CarScanner CSV/BRC and MyOpel .myop files, correlates trips across the two sources, runs a DPF state machine, and produces Italian-language AI insights. Single-container deployment.

Config.Name: WebUI
Config.Description: HTTP port for the dashboard. Open http://<unraid-ip>:<port>/

Config.Name: OBD files directory
Config.Description: Drop CarScanner CSV/BRC exports here. Watchdog auto-processes new files.

Config.Name: MyOpel files directory
Config.Description: Drop .myop exports from MyOpel emails here. Watchdog auto-processes new files.

Config.Name: Database directory
Config.Description: SQLite database storage. The trips.db file is created here.
